title: NASA confirms water on Mars
body: Scientists at NASA have confirmed the presence of water molecules on the surface of Mars, sparking excitement about potential life.
label: Real

title: Aliens built the pyramids
body: A viral post claims that aliens constructed the Egyptian pyramids using advanced technology.
label: Fake

title: Satirical news site launches new app
body: The Onion, a popular satirical news outlet, has launched a mobile app to deliver its humorous content.
label: Satire

title: Government bans chocolate
body: A fake report circulating online claims the government has banned chocolate due to health concerns.
label: Fake

title: New vaccine approved by WHO
body: The World Health Organization has approved a new vaccine for global distribution after successful trials.
label: Real

title: Dinosaurs spotted in Canada
body: A hoax article suggests dinosaurs have been seen roaming the forests of British Columbia.
label: Fake

title: Satire: Cats elected to parliament
body: In a hilarious twist, a satirical piece describes cats taking over national politics.
label: Satire
